name: CrapShoot
short_description: Kick the crap out of them! Side-scrolling bullet-hell shooter.
detailed_description:
CrapShoot is a side-scrolling bullet-hell shooter.

It is an easy shooting game with 3 stages and simple controls with only slow and bomb. The bullets are enhanced by acquiring power-up items, but if you get hit, you lose power, and the game is over when all your power is gone. Clear the game again and again to get the highest score!

The witch girl straddles a broomstick and heads for a convenience store, but dog feces and vicious wildlife block her way!

The game that gained popularity on Japanese feature phones is now available to players in a new, slightly powered-up version. In addition to pixel-perfect graphics, the nostalgic raster scrolling gives the game a retro feel.

How To Play

  • Slow and Select :

    A button, Z key, Enter key, Space key

  • Bom and Cancel :

    B button, Esc key, X key, B key, Backspace key

  • Pause:

    Start button, P key,

  • Toggle Full Screen :

    F11 key

  • Cancel FullScreen :

    Esc key

  • Reset :

    Select button long press while pausing

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Polish, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Italian
